nasb.text: He plucked off the topmost of its young twigs and brought it to a land of merchants; he set it in a city of traders.

esv.text: He broke off the topmost of its young twigs and carried it to a land of trade and set it in a city of merchants.

cnv.text: 牠啄斷樹頂的嫩枝，把它帶到貿易之地，栽種在商人的城裡。

ccb.text: 叼到一个商贾云集的城市，栽在那里。
